title: ERD Related To Details Tab — Related, Foreign, and External Sections
story: As a DataTools Pro user inspecting an object on the ERD, I want a 'Related To' tab in the side panel that shows related objects, foreign keys, and external IDs organized in separate sections, so that I can understand all inbound and outbound relationships for any object at a glance.
description:
Adds a "Related To" tab to the ERD object info side panel with three sub-sections:

### Related
Shows objects and fields that reference the selected object (inbound relationships). For example, selecting Account would show Lead (ConvertedAccountId), Opportunity (AccountId), Contact (AccountId).

### Foreign
Shows the foreign keys inside the selected object — fields that point to other objects (outbound relationships).

### External
Shows External ID fields on the selected object, with the ability to label the external application (e.g., "Hubspot") and optionally specify the parent object/table in the external system.

The three sections are displayed as nav pills within the Related To tab. Each section has an info icon ("i") with a tooltip explaining what Related, Foreign, and External mean in plain English. The object list and field name display respect the current ERD view settings (e.g., Use Field API Name toggle).
acceptance_criteria: A 'Related To' tab appears in the ERD object info side panel
The tab contains three nav pill sections: Related, Foreign, External
Related section shows objects and fields that reference the selected object
Foreign section shows foreign key fields inside the selected object
External section shows External ID fields for the selected object
Object list reflects the current ERD view's selected objects
Field names respect the 'Use Field API Name' view setting
Each section has an info icon with tooltip explaining the relationship type
External IDs can be assigned a system name and parent object label
ux_changes: New 'Related To' tab in the ERD side panel with three nav pill sub-sections (Related, Foreign, External). Each section lists relevant objects and fields with info tooltips. Display adapts to the active ERD view settings.
middleware_changes: Queries to retrieve inbound relationships (Related), outbound relationships (Foreign), and External ID fields for the selected object, filtered by the active ERD view's object list and display settings.
implementation_notes: Developer built a prototype first for validation, then refined to respect ERD view settings. External ID mapping (system name, parent object) deferred to MBT-948. Tooltips for all three sections were added after initial implementation.
comment_summary: Developer asked for clarification on what each section should show. Built a prototype with two tabs and three nav pills, then refined after feedback. External ID mapping deferred to MBT-948. Tooltips added for all three relationship type sections.
